(born April 16, 1993) is an [actor](/wiki/Actor "Actor"), [dancer](/wiki/Dancer "Dancer"), [choreographer](/wiki/Choreographer "Choreographer"), [director](/wiki/Music_video_director "Music video director") and previous member of the dance group, Mos Wanted Crew, featured on [America's Best Dance Crew](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew "America's Best Dance Crew"). He was featured on NBC's new TV show [World of Dance](/wiki/World_of_Dance "World of Dance") as Ian Eastwood and the Young Lions. He has also worked with [The Millennium Dance Complex](/wiki/The_Millennium_Dance_Complex "The Millennium Dance Complex"), Coastal Dance Rage, and Movement Lifestyle. He appeared on [Dance Showdown](/wiki/Dance_Showdown "Dance Showdown") and Return of the Superstars.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-nbc.com-3) He has also starred in the 2016 movie [*High Strung*](/wiki/High_Strung_(2016_film) "High Strung (2016 film)").

**Ian Anthony Eastwood** (born April 16, 1993) is an [actor](/wiki/Actor "Actor"), [dancer](/wiki/Dancer "Dancer"), [choreographer](/wiki/Choreographer "Choreographer"), [director](/wiki/Music_video_director "Music video director") and previous member of the dance group, Mos Wanted Crew, featured on [America's Best Dance Crew](/wiki/America%27s_Best_Dance_Crew "America's Best Dance Crew"). He was featured on NBC's new TV show [World of Dance](/wiki/World_of_Dance "World of Dance") as Ian Eastwood and the Young Lions. He has also worked with [The Millennium Dance Complex](/wiki/The_Millennium_Dance_Complex "The Millennium Dance Complex"), Coastal Dance Rage, and Movement Lifestyle. He appeared on [Dance Showdown](/wiki/Dance_Showdown "Dance Showdown") and Return of the Superstars.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-nbc.com-3) He has also starred in the 2016 movie [*High Strung*](/wiki/High_Strung_(2016_film) "High Strung (2016 film)").

## Early life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ian_Eastwood&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Early life")]

Eastwood was born in [Chicago](/wiki/Chicago "Chicago"), [Illinois](/wiki/Illinois "Illinois"). He is the son of Peter and Julia Eastwood.[[4]](#cite_note-4) He started dancing at the age of 10 years old and later moved to Hollywood after graduating high school to pursue a career in dance.
